Notes: What an awesome climb! Bomber pro the whole way and really fun movement. Can't believe it took me this long to get on it!
LRS dash to the summit & successfully got my pink tricam back! Luckily it was in soft rock. Let a couple guys rap off my anchor at the end of P2 so they could get to upper broadway a little easier.
Did a little LRS clinic with Chris on the super mega classic LISA'S PIZZAS
Classic! +1 pitch to follow
Looking for Tom's stuck cam, didn't find it :( +1 pitch to follow

Flashed pitch 1 (only followed it once I guess) and did the classic Alzheimer’s onsight for pitch 2. Such an awesome climb!! When I followed pitch 2 I went right on the face above the small roof pull and it was a delightful little sequence. Would definitely want a human belayer to go for it on lead, but it would be plenty well protected and a lot of fun!
Guiding CHM
Guiding CHM
LRS w/ Revo. Only three pitches because I cleaned the money pitch on rappel. So stoked to get the send solo!
LRS w/ Revo, � pitch to clean and � scramble approach pitch. Woo!!

LRS with revo. Linked pitches 2&3. Learned some tricks for LRS traversing! Saw a fox briefly on the approach trail from pitch 2 so cute. Beautiful setting!! 6h13m gate to gate, and I took several long snack breaks!
LRS with revo.
LRS with revo. Got rained off at the top of P1 by a lightning storm. Still worth it!

LRS w/ revo. Started 15 minutes before sunset to beat the heat, climbed most of it in the dark by headlamp. Crossed paths with two women rapping down as I was finishing up P1. Rigged P3 to rap after leading it so I didn't have to reclimb. Beautiful views of the city the whole way up!

LRS w/ revo. Did italianos to where it meets CEPI in two pitches and two hours. Took a snack break and it started raining so I took CEPI to the summit :( no french freeing on the follow pitches though!
CEPI via on the Sugarloaf. LRS with revo for most of it, then just daisy soloed the rest. Got a blister on my hand from all the hauling on cable
LRS with revo. Mosquitoes were HORRIBLE for the first pitch, probably because it rained overnight. Otherwise pretty sweet!

LRS with revo. 
Got lost after the Rubro Negro crack and did a 55m pitch all the way to the top. Kinda sketch way up there! Had to bushwhack through hella dense bamboo to get out, totally nackered
Soloed to the last pitch, then LRS w/ Grigri

LRS w/ Revo. Sick climb, awesome movement throughout! Don't dodge the off width/chimney on P2 by going right to those flakes, the pro is garbage and there's a wonderful hidden hand crack if you go straight up. P3 is well worth it, should be climbed more.
LRS w/ Revo. Just the last two pitches, linked them together into a rope stretcher 40m pitch! Pitch 3 was sweet, took the direct var.
Aid rope solo with Revo. Get a connect adjust, they're awesome. 1h6m
LRS w/ Revo. One mega pitch with one follow
LRS w/ Revo
LRS w/ revo. Guiding
LRS w/ Revo. Just pitch 1 to set up a TR. Guiding
LRS w/ Revo. One pitch to the skyline anchors  1 to follow. Pro on the corner is super sus. Was this corner really Bella Vista Lotus Var?
LRS w/ Revo. Lives up to the hype, it was dope!! Great pro throughout too
Guiding. LRS with Revo. Just P1.
LRS w revo. Just pitch one to set a toprope for the children. � TR lap to clean
LRS with revo. Decent!
LRS with revo. First pitch was good, the second pitch was the most garbage pitch I've ever done at Seneca
LRS with Revo. Linked pitches 1&2 and 3&4. I thought the second pitch was the money!
LRS w/ Revo & mtrax. Did one mega pitch from the base of Lichen or Leave it all the way to the ridge, about 55m. Scrambled down the observation deck to take the tourist trail down. Neat crux!
LRS w/ Revo. A good time! Linked the last two pitches
LRS w/ Revo. Went in direct once to handle the back feeding
LRS w/ Revo  a follow pitch. Fun route! On point at 5.9 I think, so pretty soft by Seneca standards
LRS w/ Revo. Only did the short pitch to critter crack after doing the direct start
LRS w/ Revo. Whoever says this is sustained couldn't find a no-hands rest if it hit em over the head!
LRS w/ revo
LRS w/ revo, chock only ascent for practice

LRS P1, followed P2, both clean. Led P3 and P4, kinda hang dogged both, but had a great time!! Wind was so bad it could blow a fart UP my ass. 50mph winds towards the top, just about got blown off the rock!
LRS with Revo. Super stoked to have done my first aid climb!!
LRS with revo. Fun climb, but there was mouse piss and shit all over it
LRS with revo. Something on Pete's Rock towards the left, went to a roof, some tricky moves just after the roof then a cakewalk up a slab
LRS with revo. Some random route at Pete's Rock, just left of one of the easier lines, followed the smaller crack. Bootied a fixed nut that looked to have been there a good while!
LRS w/ Revo, did the 5.7 variation. Kinda tricky to protect up to the first bolt!
LRS w/ revo
LRS with revo. It's as good as they say!!
LRS w/ one follow pitch
LRS with Revo and micro Trax. Got accosted by a giant spider part way up and he disappeared when I bumped up a cam! Also first time rapping on a munter because my memory is terrible

LRS with Revo and micro Trax. Soloed the first pitch, linked 2 and 3 as well as the final two pitches. Started raining as I was following the very last pitch. Great day out! Climbed behind Daniel and Emily; good quality chatting
LRS w/ Revo
LRS w/ Revo. Didn't end up using many jams, but a good time nonetheless!
LRS w/ Revo. One extra TR solo pitch to clean
LRS w/ Revo. Felt like getting in some more mileage, climbed with Fin and Freke hot on my tail
LRS w/ Revo. Spooky foot slip on pitch 1 but didn't fall! Linked pitches 2 and 3
LRS with Revo. Fantastic jams for three whole pitches!! Rope kept getting caught in cracks, had to make my pitch 2 belay way early because of a snarl caught in a crack. Started at 10pm, took 3 hours.
LRS. Shamelessly French freed most follow pitches and the last one on lead, which was pretty wet from rain yesterday. Topped out in the sunset!
LRS. Gave me a run for my money!
LRS. Second lap on TRS to clean after letting the fam give it a shot
LRS

Climb: To Tee or Not To Tee
Notes: LRS. Took a practice fall halfway up
LRS w/ revo. P2 was 80% sopping wet, made for a bit of spice
LRS P1 w/ revo
LRS w/ revo & mtrax. Took a short fall at the 5th bolt due to pump and fuck it
LRS w/ revo & mtrax. Took some practice whips from the anchors
